name: 30 Minute Mobility Flow
description: A yoga-inspired mobility flow focusing on hip opening, spinal twists, and dynamic stretches. 8 exercises performed as a continuous sequence, each for 10-15 reps. Repeat the full sequence to fill 30 minutes.

exercises.notes: Squat to standing, head stays down, hands touching toes
Step from standing to pigeon, hold briefly
Pulse hips forward and back, focus on hip opening
Breathe with movement — inhale arch, exhale round
Smooth transitions, slide forward through the floor

tips: Perform as a continuous flow — no rest between exercises
Breathe deeply and move slowly with each transition
Repeat the full sequence if needed to reach 30 minutes
Focus on controlled, smooth movements over speed
Mobility: the secret ingredient to pain-free movement
